_about: Reference targets for ddX-enabled PCM validation. PRODUCTION PCM PHYSICS IS FORTRAN-SIDE; these values are comparison targets only and never feed the SCF. The tier2 closed-shell rows are OpenQP/ddX trusted regression baselines from the stabilized diagnostic convention, not literature benchmarks. A row is a hard pass/fail gate when reference_value is non-null and status is 'verified'.

trusted_reference_regressions.description: ddPCM electrostatic solvation energy of a fixed 12-site point-charge model (no QM SCF). Validates the OpenQP<->ddX adapter numerics (model build -> solve -> esolv) only.
trusted_reference_regressions.source: source/solvent_ddx_adapter.c::oqp_ddx_run_point_charge_smoke (value asserted in-source within 1e-6 at line ~181); printed as 'energy=<float>' by tests/ddx_adapter_smoke.c

empirical_verification.note: Verified via real ddX build through oqp_ddx_adapter_smoke; the ~8e-7 difference from the pinned value is ddX-version sensitivity, still inside 1e-6. FD check: |dE/dphi0-(-0.5 q_cav0)|~9.5e-11 vs |dE/dphi0-q_cav0|~9.7e-5, confirming chg=-0.5*q_cav.

trusted_reference_regressions.validates: ddX model allocation, electrostatics, forward/adjoint solve, and esolv numerics through the OpenQP-owned C adapter
trusted_reference_regressions.does_not_validate: QM SCF coupling -- electronic contribution to psi, q_cav sign/scale into the Fock operator, phi_cav-from-density convention, and e_pcm vs 0.5*Tr[D.V] bookkeeping all remain open and require the Tier-2 QM benchmarks below

benchmarks.reference_source: OpenQP/ddX closed-shell diagnostic baseline generated on feat/solvent-backend-spike at 4e14577e810e; same Fortran/C ddX protocol as the regression test. This is a trusted regression baseline, not an independent literature value.
benchmarks.doi_or_url: n/a; OpenQP/ddX same-branch trusted regression baseline, not a literature value
